tagline: High-performance multipurpose enterprise platform for governance, telemetry, and management of your organization.
trainingDesc: Immediate feedback, detailed explanations and no global time pressure. Ideal for building foundations.
mockDesc: Real conditions. 10 minutes, 30s per task, no way back. The definitive test.
sidebarNotice: Or utilize the left control sidebar panel
feature1Desc: Real-time tactical simulation with integrated global stopwatch and question-specific countdown logical loops.
feature2Desc: Complete enforcement of simple, incorrect-penalty, and weighted difficulty coefficient evaluation schemes.
feature3Desc: Strict Zod validation of content schemas and batch deduplication via SHA-256 hashes to preserve corpus purity.
examsDescription: Select a simulation template to begin your technical evaluation. All timing and scoring parameters will be enforced automatically.
